title: Compare all the players who have played Specter across all available runs. Use only metrics from time logged on Specter. Compare only players who are members of FAFO guild. Prioritize Barrier Per Second > Healing Per Second > Cleanses Per Second > Downed Healing Per Second > Stability output per Second > Resistance output per Second > Outgoing CC. Player downs and deaths count as minimum negative. Minimum Sample of 2 runs per player. Create a table with weighted results

turns.userText: Compare all the players who have played Specter across all available runs. Use only metrics from time logged on Specter. Compare only players who are members of FAFO guild. Prioritize Barrier Per Second > Healing Per Second > Cleanses Per Second > Downed Healing Per Second > Stability output per Second > Resistance output per Second > Outgoing CC. Player downs and deaths count as minimum negative. Minimum Sample of 2 runs per player. Create a table with weighted results
turns.agentText:
I’m pulling the FAFO roster and the available AxiBridge report range first so I can constrain the comparison to guild members and real report coverage.

The report coverage is 30 runs from Apr 25 to Jun 22. The direct guild-roster call on `FAFO` failed with `membership required`, so I’m checking which guilds the configured GW2 API key can actually read before I filter the player list.

I have the FAFO roster now. Next I’m probing the AxiBridge summary shape so I can isolate only `Specter` time and count how many runs each FAFO member logged on that spec.

I’ve confirmed the run summaries only carry per-player combat aggregates plus class-time splits. The support metrics you asked for are published separately, so I’m first narrowing to the FAFO members who actually logged `Specter` in at least 2 runs, then I’ll pull the barrier/healing/cleanse/boon/CC sections for just those runs.

Some `Specter` appearances are mixed-class runs, and the published support sections are per player per run, not split by class within a run. To keep this exact instead of estimated, I’m restricting the sample to pure-`Specter` runs only; then the per-run support metrics are genuinely Specter-only.

I’ve got the pure-`Specter` sample set and the summary-side support totals. I’m now filling the three metrics that only exist in published sections: `downedHealing`, boon generation for `Stability` and `Resistance`, and outgoing CC.

The section pulls are complete. I’m converting the published totals to per-second rates on pure-`Specter` combat time, then normalizing them into a weighted composite with your priority order and only light penalties for downs and deaths.

DraGonfly.9317 leads the FAFO Specter sample with an 86.4 weighted score across 2 pure-Specter runs, ahead of AMINE.5278 at 79.1 and Fibbs.1623 at 72.8.

I found 12 FAFO members who met the `>= 2` run minimum on pure `Specter` runs, for 49 qualifying player-runs total across the 29 available published runs. Because AxiBridge’s boon/healing/CC sections are not split by profession inside a mixed-class run, I excluded mixed-class Specter appearances so every metric below is genuinely Specter-only. `Stab/s` and `Resist/s` use `groupGenSec / combat second`; `CC/s` uses `appliedCC / combat second`. The weighted score normalizes each rate, then applies your priority order with light inverse penalties for downs and deaths.

| Rank | Account | Runs | Specter hrs | Barrier/s | Healing/s | Cleanses/s | Downed H/s | Stab/s | Resist/s | CC/s | Downs/hr | Deaths/hr | Weighted |
|---|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| 1 | DraGonfly.9317 | 2 | 1.63 | 2420 | 1934 | 0.89 | 261 | 3.49 | 0.71 | 0.019 | 17.8 | 11.7 | 86.4 |
| 2 | AMINE.5278 | 3 | 2.24 | 2445 | 1508 | 1.26 | 82 | 3.17 | 0.60 | 0.014 | 9.4 | 5.8 | 79.1 |
| 3 | Fibbs.1623 | 3 | 2.32 | 2529 | 1184 | 0.90 | 73 | 4.45 | 0.64 | 0.025 | 3.9 | 1.3 | 72.8 |
| 4 | Aeri.4529 | 7 | 4.89 | 2009 | 1658 | 1.19 | 162 | 4.26 | 0.72 | 0.025 | 12.7 | 11.3 | 65.3 |
| 5 | Mes.1906 | 3 | 3.02 | 1977 | 1449 | 1.12 | 161 | 3.10 | 0.56 | 0.017 | 6.6 | 5.3 | 56.5 |
| 6 | LightspeedJack.9473 | 2 | 1.29 | 1988 | 1510 | 1.04 | 107 | 2.34 | 0.58 | 0.027 | 20.1 | 15.5 | 53.9 |
| 7 | Cavalier.4015 | 2 | 1.82 | 1679 | 1216 | 0.87 | 93 | 3.11 | 0.50 | 0.021 | 4.9 | 1.6 | 32.2 |
| 8 | Genki.3125 | 3 | 2.85 | 1864 | 795 | 0.73 | 48 | 1.90 | 0.38 | 0.014 | 6.7 | 3.9 | 26.0 |
| 9 | RedBeard.5743 | 5 | 3.81 | 1802 | 791 | 0.55 | 58 | 3.07 | 0.46 | 0.008 | 24.1 | 13.4 | 20.7 |
| 10 | woahs.1329 | 4 | 3.31 | 1443 | 1160 | 0.86 | 106 | 2.38 | 0.49 | 0.025 | 17.2 | 7.3 | 18.9 |
| 11 | Kaitles.6094 | 7 | 5.93 | 1494 | 1102 | 0.75 | 87 | 2.94 | 0.42 | 0.017 | 11.5 | 7.6 | 18.0 |
| 12 | Bouzouki.7598 | 8 | 6.22 | 1450 | 727 | 0.50 | 69 | 1.97 | 0.45 | 0.014 | 14.0 | 8.0 | 2.4 |

The main separation at the top is straightforward: DraGonfly wins on `Healing/s` and `Downed H/s`, AMINE wins `Cleanses/s`, and Fibbs wins `Barrier/s` while also posting the lowest downs/deaths rate by a wide margin. At the bottom, Bouzouki, Kaitles, and woahs are dragged down mostly by lower `Barrier/s`, `Healing/s`, and `Cleanses/s`, not by sample size.

If you want, I can turn this into a second pass that shows each player’s best and worst qualifying Specter runs and what specific nights moved their weighted result up or down.
